title: Markit – a fast, native Markdown editor (Go and Wails)
abstract: Markit is your go-to Markdown editor for coding and writing papers alike. With a clean interface and smooth operations, it's like dancing with your words to quickstep beats. Give it a try; you might just find that writing can be this cool!
abstract_zh: Markit，你身边的Markdown编辑神器！无论你是写代码还是赶论文，它都能让你的文字飞起来。界面简洁明了，操作流畅无比，就像在和文字跳快闪舞。快来试试吧，你会发现写作原来这么酷！
